allow: PowerShell($files = Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Users\\Artist Emperor\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\genie-website\\img\\'; foreach \($f in $files\) { try { $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($f.FullName\); "$\($f.Name\): readable, $\($bytes.Length\) bytes" } catch { "$\($f.Name\): ERROR - $_" } })

PowerShell($src = "C:\\Users\\Artist Emperor\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\genie-website"; $dst = "C:\\Users\\Artist Emperor\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\genie-website-deploy.zip"; if \(Test-Path $dst\) { Remove-Item $dst -Force }; $files = Get-ChildItem -Path $src -Force | Where-Object { $_.Name -ne ".claude" }; Compress-Archive -Path $files.FullName -DestinationPath $dst -Force; Write-Host "ZIP created at: $dst"; Get-Item $dst | Select-Object Name, @{N='SizeKB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB,1\)}})

PowerShell($zip = "C:\\Users\\Artist Emperor\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\genie-website-deploy.zip"; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $archive = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\($zip\); $archive.Entries | Select-Object FullName, @{N='SizeKB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB,1\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize; $archive.Dispose\(\); Write-Host ""; Write-Host "Total zip size:"; Get-Item $zip | Select-Object @{N='SizeKB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB,1\)}})
